title: 5 Claude Co-work Workflows For LinkedIn

slides.headline: Make your posts __searchable__
slides.introText: Paste your full post history into a **Project** once. Reuse it later.
bullets: Grouped by topic and recurring ideas
slides.mockupContent: Please create a searchable knowledge base from all my LinkedIn posts...
slides.annotation: Paste your full post history once. Reuse it later.

slides.headline: Turn ~~viral posts~~ into repeatable formats
bullets: Applies the pattern to your idea
slides.mockupContent: Please analyze high-performing LinkedIn posts and help me write in that structure...

slides.headline: Turn conversations into __content__
slides.mockupContent: Please build me a LinkedIn content calendar based on what I'm already saying...

slides.headline: Ready to work smarter?
slides.ctaText: Follow for more AI automation tips

caption:
Claude Co-work isn't a chatbot.

It's a workspace where you bring context—and it handles the thinking.

Here are 5 workflows I use for LinkedIn:

1. Make posts searchable
2. Turn viral posts into repeatable formats
3. Turn conversations into content
4. Research-backed writing
5. Content calendar automation

Save this and try workflow #1 today.
